top_stories.title: A July rate hike from the Fed? The odds are rising
top_stories.insight: The possibility of a July rate hike by the Fed could significantly impact the economy and financial markets.

top_stories.title: Waller says Fed shouldn't 'fight the last war' on inflation but warns hikes still possible
top_stories.insight: The Fed's approach to inflation and potential rate hikes will be crucial in determining the direction of the economy.

top_stories.title: Fed officials were split on direction of interest rates at last meeting, minutes show
top_stories.insight: The division among Fed officials on interest rates could lead to uncertainty in the financial markets.

top_stories.title: Goldman Sachs wins $70 billion in asset management deals with Verizon, Lockheed Martin
top_stories.insight: Goldman Sachs' significant asset management deals could boost its revenue and market share.

top_stories.title: Brent Tops $85, Rate-Hike Bets Rise Before US CPI: Markets Wrap
top_stories.insight: The increase in Brent prices and rate-hike bets could impact the global economy and financial markets.

daily_summary: The financial markets are focused on the possibility of a July rate hike by the Fed, with odds rising and Fed officials split on the direction of interest rates. Meanwhile, Goldman Sachs has secured significant asset management deals, and Brent prices have topped $85.
